sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n44897" key="eu)pte/rugos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">εὐπτέρῠγος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <abbr TEIform="abbr">=</abbr> foreg.<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0024.tlg001.perseus-grc1:3:125" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Opp.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">C.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3.125</biblScope> </bibl>; of ships, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">AP</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">10.6</biblScope> </bibl> (<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Satyr.</author></bibl>, dub. l.).</entryFree>
